sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69310" key="muri/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῠρ-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">μύρον</etym>) <sense id="n69310.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">box for unguents</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:177" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.177</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n69310.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μυρρίς</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
